title: GMRCL – Non Executive – 383 Posts
org: Station Controller/Train Operator, Junior Engineer, Maintainer
shortInfo: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRCL) Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 383 vacancies for Sataion Controller, JE, Maintainer Posts. Candidates can apply online only from 29.04.2026 to 28.05.2026 through GMRCL website gujaratmetrorail.com.

basic_details.job_title: Gujarat Metro Rail Non Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 383 Sataion Controller, JE, Maintainer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRCL) Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 383 vacancies for Sataion Controller, JE, Maintainer Posts. Candidates can apply online only from 29.04.2026 to 28.05.2026 through GMRCL website gujaratmetrorail.com.
basic_details.post_name: Station Controller/Train Operator, Junior Engineer, Maintainer

age_limit.age_details: 18 to 28 Years (SC/TO & JE) / 18 to 25 Years (Maintainer) as on date of advertisement

selection_process: Written Test + Psycho Aptitude Test (for SC/TO) + Document Verification + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official GMRCL website. No hard copy or offline applications will be accepted. Candidates are advised to complete the application process well before the last date to avoid last-minute technical issues.
seo_tags: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation Non Executive Recruitment 2026
